name: Hotel Occupancy
query: SELECT r.check_in AS 'Date:Date', rt.property AS 'Property:Link/Property:150', COUNT(DISTINCT r.name) AS 'Reservations:Int:120', SUM(r.rooms_requested) AS 'Rooms Booked:Int:120' FROM `tabReservation` r JOIN `tabRoom Type` rt ON rt.name = r.room_type WHERE r.status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'no_show') GROUP BY r.check_in, rt.property ORDER BY r.check_in DESC
